nasb.text: that the kingdom might be in subjection, not exalting itself, but keeping his covenant that it might continue.

esv.text: that the kingdom might be humble and not lift itself up, and keep his covenant that it might stand.

cnv.text: 使國衰微，不能再興盛，唯有謹守條約他才可以繼續存在。

ccb.text: 使犹大国臣服于他，无法图强，只能遵守盟约，以求生存。
